data.title: Scaramucci: Bitcoin Is a Volatile Asset, But 'Ready for Prime Time Institutional Investing'
data.description: In an unprecedented development, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) surged past the $100,000 mark last week, a first in its history.

data.title: Musk Fuels Speculation On US Bitcoin Reserve As Crypto Surges
data.description: Elon Musk has ignited speculation regarding the potential creation of a U.S. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) strategic reserve.

data.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT Makes Headway In Search, Threatening Google's Reign
data.description: ChatGPT is gaining traction in the online search market, potentially challenging Google's long-established supremacy.

data.title: Trump Taps Perdue for China, Signaling More Tension with Beijing
data.description: President-elect Trump will name ex-Sen. David Perdue (R-Ga.) as his choice for ambassador to China, a pivotal role in shaping the future of U.S.-China relations.

data.title: Intel Stock Is Where It Was 27 Years Ago: How The World's Leading Chipmaker Lost The Plot, Thrice
data.description: Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) stock has plummeted by over 56% YTD due to losing ground in chip market to rivals like AMD, Nvidia, Qualcomm.
